languages.original_text: "Genetor Februs, technomats on several decks have reported spontaneous power outages across auxiliary ship systems. Synchronous with this, an influx of Motive Force has been recorded in your laboratory. As the Chief Enginseer on board, I request an explanation."

languages.text: "Генетор Фебрус, техноматы нескольких палуб рапортуют о спонтанных обесточиваниях малых систем корабля. Одновременно зарегистрирован приток Движущей Силы к твоей лаборатории. Как главный технопровидец судна, я запрашиваю разъяснений".

"Genetor Februs, technomats on several decks have reported spontaneous power outages across auxiliary ship systems. Synchronous with this, an influx of Motive Force has been recorded in your laboratory. As the Chief Enginseer on board, I request an explanation."
languages.original_text: "Генетор Фебрус, техноматы нескольких палуб рапортуют о спонтанных обесточиваниях малых систем корабля. Одновременно зарегистрирован приток Движущей Силы к твоей лаборатории. Как главный технопровидец судна, я запрашиваю разъяснений".

traits.locale_text: "Genetor Februs, technomats on several decks have reported spontaneous power outages across auxiliary ship systems. Synchronous with this, an influx of Motive Force has been recorded in your laboratory. As the Chief Enginseer on board, I request an explanation."

"Genetor Februs, technomats on several decks have reported spontaneous power outages across auxiliary ship systems. Synchronous with this, an influx of Motive Force has been recorded in your laboratory. As the Chief Enginseer on board, I request an explanation."

"Genetor Februs, technomats on several decks have reported spontaneous power outages across auxiliary ship systems. Synchronous with this, an influx of Motive Force has been recorded in your laboratory. As the Chief Enginseer on board, I request an explanation."

languages.text: «Genetor Februs, los tecnómatas de varias cubiertas han informado de apagones espontáneos en los sistemas auxiliares del sistema. Al mismo tiempo, se ha registrado un flujo de Fuerza Motriz en su laboratorio. Como visioingeniero jefe de la nave, solicito una explicación».
languages.original_text: "Genetor Februs, technomats on several decks have reported spontaneous power outages across auxiliary ship systems. Synchronous with this, an influx of Motive Force has been recorded in your laboratory. As the Chief Enginseer on board, I request an explanation."

traits.locale_text: «Genetor Februs, los tecnómatas de varias cubiertas han informado de apagones espontáneos en los sistemas auxiliares del sistema. Al mismo tiempo, se ha registrado un flujo de Fuerza Motriz en su laboratorio. Como visioingeniero jefe de la nave, solicito una explicación».

languages.text: 「ゲネター・フェブラス、複数のデッキのテクノマットから、補助艦内システム全般にわたる突発的な停電の報告が上がっています。これと同期して、あなたの研究室でモーティヴ・フォースの流入が記録されました。艦上の主席エンジンシアとして、自分は説明を求めます」
languages.original_text: "Genetor Februs, technomats on several decks have reported spontaneous power outages across auxiliary ship systems. Synchronous with this, an influx of Motive Force has been recorded in your laboratory. As the Chief Enginseer on board, I request an explanation."

traits.locale_text: 「ゲネター・フェブラス、複数のデッキのテクノマットから、補助艦内システム全般にわたる突発的な停電の報告が上がっています。これと同期して、あなたの研究室でモーティヴ・フォースの流入が記録されました。艦上の主席エンジンシアとして、自分は説明を求めます」

languages.text: “基因士费布鲁斯，数个甲板上的技工报告，称舰船的辅助系统出现了自发断电。与此同时，记录显示你的实验室有大股源力涌入。作为舰上的首席引擎先知，我要求你做出解释。”
languages.original_text: "Genetor Februs, technomats on several decks have reported spontaneous power outages across auxiliary ship systems. Synchronous with this, an influx of Motive Force has been recorded in your laboratory. As the Chief Enginseer on board, I request an explanation."

traits.locale_text: “基因士费布鲁斯，数个甲板上的技工报告，称舰船的辅助系统出现了自发断电。与此同时，记录显示你的实验室有大股源力涌入。作为舰上的首席引擎先知，我要求你做出解释。”

languages.text: "Genetor Februs, Technomaten auf mehreren Decks haben spontane Energieausfälle verschiedener Sekundärsysteme des Schiffs gemeldet. Damit einhergehend wurde in Eurem Laboratorium ein Zufluss von Antriebskraft registriert. Als leitender Maschinenseher an Bord verlange ich eine Erklärung."
languages.original_text: "Genetor Februs, technomats on several decks have reported spontaneous power outages across auxiliary ship systems. Synchronous with this, an influx of Motive Force has been recorded in your laboratory. As the Chief Enginseer on board, I request an explanation."

traits.locale_text: "Genetor Februs, Technomaten auf mehreren Decks haben spontane Energieausfälle verschiedener Sekundärsysteme des Schiffs gemeldet. Damit einhergehend wurde in Eurem Laboratorium ein Zufluss von Antriebskraft registriert. Als leitender Maschinenseher an Bord verlange ich eine Erklärung."

languages.text: « Genetor Februs, les technomates ont signalé des coupures de courant sur différents ponts affectant les systèmes auxiliaires du vaisseau. Au même moment, un afflux de Force Motrice a été détecté dans votre laboratoire. En tant que technaugure en chef, j'exige des explications. »
languages.original_text: "Genetor Februs, technomats on several decks have reported spontaneous power outages across auxiliary ship systems. Synchronous with this, an influx of Motive Force has been recorded in your laboratory. As the Chief Enginseer on board, I request an explanation."

traits.locale_text: « Genetor Februs, les technomates ont signalé des coupures de courant sur différents ponts affectant les systèmes auxiliaires du vaisseau. Au même moment, un afflux de Force Motrice a été détecté dans votre laboratoire. En tant que technaugure en chef, j'exige des explications. »

languages.text: "Birkaç güvertedeki teknomatlar, yardımcı gemi sistemlerinde kendiliğinden elektrik kesintileri bildirdi Genetör Februs. Bununla eş zamanlı olarak laboratuvarınıza bir Devinim Gücü akışı kaydedildi. Gemideki Baş Mühedyum olarak açıklama talep ediyorum."
languages.original_text: "Genetor Februs, technomats on several decks have reported spontaneous power outages across auxiliary ship systems. Synchronous with this, an influx of Motive Force has been recorded in your laboratory. As the Chief Enginseer on board, I request an explanation."

traits.locale_text: "Birkaç güvertedeki teknomatlar, yardımcı gemi sistemlerinde kendiliğinden elektrik kesintileri bildirdi Genetör Februs. Bununla eş zamanlı olarak laboratuvarınıza bir Devinim Gücü akışı kaydedildi. Gemideki Baş Mühedyum olarak açıklama talep ediyorum."
